subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto My call, and be not of them that are heedless of the fragrant breezes of nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد اسمع ندائی و لاتکن من الذینهم کانوا عن نفحات القرب الغافلین ثم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
